description: Users should not be able to both create and approve vendor bills to prevent fraud and ensure proper financial controls
remediation_guidance: Remove either the Bill Creation permission or the Bill Approval permission. Implement dual control with separate users for entry and approval.

description: Users should not be able to both create and approve journal entries to prevent unauthorized financial adjustments
remediation_guidance: Separate journal entry creation and approval roles. Ensure maker-checker control for all journal entries.

description: Users performing bank reconciliations should not be able to create or modify cash transactions
remediation_guidance: Assign bank reconciliation responsibilities to users who do not have access to create cash transactions.

description: Users managing customer credit limits should not handle collections to prevent abuse
remediation_guidance: Separate credit management from collections functions. Credit limit changes should be approved by management.

description: Users should not be able to both create and approve purchase orders to ensure proper procurement controls
remediation_guidance: Implement segregation between PO creation and approval. Use approval workflows based on dollar thresholds.

rule_name: Vendor Master Data vs. AP Processing
description: Users who can create or modify vendor records should not process vendor payments
remediation_guidance: Separate vendor master data maintenance from AP processing. Require dual approval for vendor banking detail changes.

description: Users should not have both administrator privileges and regular business user access
remediation_guidance: Use separate accounts for administrative tasks and business operations. Implement privileged access management (PAM).

description: Users who develop or modify SuiteScripts should not have permissions to deploy to production
remediation_guidance: Implement change management process with code review and separate deployment approvals.

description: Users who can create or modify user accounts should not perform business transactions
remediation_guidance: Separate IT administration from business operations. Use role-based access control (RBAC).

rule_name: Revenue Recognition vs. Sales Order Entry
description: Users who can recognize revenue should not create or modify sales orders
remediation_guidance: Separate revenue recognition functions from sales order processing. Implement automated revenue recognition where possible.

description: Users who can make inventory adjustments should not perform warehouse transactions
remediation_guidance: Limit inventory adjustment permissions to supervisory roles. Require approval for adjustments above threshold.

rule_name: Payroll Processing vs. Employee Master Data
description: Users who process payroll should not be able to create or modify employee records
remediation_guidance: Separate payroll processing from HR master data maintenance. Implement dual control for employee banking changes.

description: Users who create budgets should not be able to approve their own budgets
remediation_guidance: Implement hierarchical budget approval workflow. Department budgets approved by management.

rule_name: Pricing Maintenance vs. Sales Order Entry
description: Users who maintain pricing should not create sales orders to prevent unauthorized discounts
remediation_guidance: Separate pricing administration from sales order entry. Implement discount approval workflows.

rule_name: Sales Commission Setup vs. Commission Processing
description: Users who configure sales commission plans should not process or approve commission payments
remediation_guidance: Separate commission plan configuration from commission payment processing. Require management approval.

rule_name: Custom Record Definition vs. Data Entry
description: Users who can define custom records should not have mass data entry permissions
remediation_guidance: Separate system configuration from data operations. Use version control for custom record definitions.

rule_name: Audit Log Access vs. Financial Transactions
description: Users who can view or modify audit logs should not perform financial transactions
remediation_guidance: Restrict audit log access to compliance and IT security roles only. Ensure audit logs are immutable.

description: Compliance officers should not have permissions to perform the activities they monitor
remediation_guidance: Ensure compliance and audit roles remain independent from operational functions. Use separate accounts.
